name: Naau Cafe
notes: Had the rasberry matcha. wasnt anything outstanding, but matcha itself was decent. I had the pistachio cream however, an that was good, and they have surpisngly improved?

name: Osoi
notes: Aesthetic is nice, matcha is nice and they have some different drinks available. Banananoffee affagato is to die for

name: Torori Warabimochi Australia
notes: so many flavours and so many choices and the matcha is good

name: Donatellos
notes: Perfect for a sunday morning. On the sweeter sde. but they improved the recipes sm, and the matcha itself is good

name: Good Measure
notes: They only have matcha with soy milk so it made it really bitter but in an unnpleasant way. but everyone likes it. So I guess, i need to retry it.

name: Bola Bakes
notes: Matcha is weak, but their drinks are good.

name: nimbo
notes: Not bad, the cookies were really good too, but nothing standed out

name: Bal Bakes
notes: milky

name: Haikuu
notes: Authentic, nicely done, but expensive for the small plastic cups is crazy

name: Be Merry
notes: sweet, nice company to the 10/10 of crepes they have though. Not bad matcha considering few places in Doncaster though

name: Bloomwood
notes: Surprisingly good, the matcha flavour was there but the banana matcha was too sweet.

name: Humble Rays
notes: Sweet, but nice to have while studying

name: Suupaa
notes: Very strong matcha flavour. likr bitter in your mouth, forced to sip matcha, but honestly it was good and nice, dont go here if you want diabetic matcha

name: Molly Tea
notes: PERFUME IN A MATCHA BUT IN A GOOOOOOD WAY!!!!!!!!!!!!

name: Heytea
address: Emporium Melbourne, Lonsdale St, Melbourne VIC 3000
notes: Rating is subject to change. Recently got the matcha blue coconut drink, which was good but not enough matcha

name: GRB
address: Sydney Rd & Barry Rd, Campbellfield VIC 3061
notes: got the strawberry matcha. Tasted like strawberry milk? where the matcha at???????

name: Axl Coffee
notes: disgusting. dont even bother. they store the matcha in premade little containers as well, and then just like blitz it i guess with water and there are clumps when you drink it and its sickening

name: People's Coffee
notes: milky, and it is premade and it tastes bitter and gross.

name: Flovie Florist Café
notes: mid

name: it's bagels
notes: Disgusting, extra points off because it literally looked like a biohazard

name: cardigan 55
notes: oddly sweet but not in a bad way, and like sometimes I do get what people mean when they say matcha is fishy lol. An extra point for how close it is to uni and it makes my life sm eaiser and they have wifi as well!!!!!

name: Palette. & Palette.atnight
address: 610 Queensberry Street, North Melbourne VIC 3051, Australia
notes: really weak lol. even the food is terribly mid, people only go for the aesthetic, and you cannot change my mind lol

name: Miyama Melbourne
notes: Not bad, but the food is even better and very cute. the matcha was not anything outstanding the colouring was a little bright tbh

name: Amiri cafe
address: Shop R02, 14 Cnr Lonsdale Street, QV, Melbourne VIC 3000
notes: Expensiveeeeeeee. but the matcha itself was good, extra point because they are open late

name: hikari
notes: The colour is slightly lighter then i like, i think maybe get the iced matcha latte, extra strong? the flavour profile is slightly weak, but still good though, bevause too much milk? but it is a nice spot to sit tho.
bestOrder: need to try the blooming one

name: REGULARS
address: GROUND FLOOR/38-40 Little La Trobe St
notes: REALLY GOOD. I had the cold cup and the matcha is handwhisked, and it was pistachio flavour and they had so many different flavours which I am so keen to try. new favourite?

name: Karomi cafe
address: 228 La Trobe St, 9 Baskerville Ln, Melbourne VIC 3000
notes: can make better matcha in my house lol. Very basic, weak profile in my humble opinion.
